title: I Have a Crush on a Creeper?!?
description: A dating sim-themed entrant for ModFest 26
body:
# I Have a Crush on a Creeper?!?

![A screenshot of a dialogue menu with a Creeper on the right. It reads "It's for me?!? The Creeper reads the letter. I'm flattered, but we've only just met..."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6EQ8D192/images/9009e735a96fdf88be124edc36e00098430ee3b5.png)

This small entrant to ModFest 26.1 is a proof-of-concept for a data-driven dating sim mod. The current version adds one item: The Love Letter!

Just hold a love letter in your hands and use it on a Creeper to start a dialogue with it. I'm sure anyone would be flattered to get a letter from you!

I made an overview of this and other ModFest entrants! Check it out:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qKSX5tvgsBI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Made for ModFest 26](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfae3e334cfc08cd02cff58113914262e31f0ef5.png)
